zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bartlett於1532年出生在英國英格蘭戴文可利頓時，他的父親Sir William Edmund Barttlett28歲，母親Agnes Hurst-15歲。他於1558年10月28日與Johane Miller在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1590年在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bartlett于1532年出生在英国英格兰戴文可利頓时，他的父亲Sir William Edmund Barttlett28岁，母亲Agnes Hurst-15岁。他于1558年10月28日与Johane Miller在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1590年在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bartlett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Bertelot, Bartelot (with the Old French double diminutive suffix -elot), a pet form of Bartholomew .

History: This is the name of a well-established New England family. Its members include Josiah Bartlett (1729–95), who was born in Amesbury, MA, and became governor of NH (1790–94). A Richard Bartlet(t) settled in Newbury, MA, in 1635.

variants.name: Bartholomew
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Bertilmew, Bertelmy, a borrowing of the Old French form of the Biblical personal name Bartholomew (from Latin Bartholomaeus; Hebrew ‘son of Talmai’, said to mean ‘having many furrows’, i.e. rich in land). This was an extremely popular personal name in Christian Europe, with many vernacular derivatives. It derived its popularity from the apostle Saint Bartholomew (Matthew 10:3), who was, among other things, the patron saint of tanners, vintners, and butlers.
As an Irish name, it has been used as an Anglicized form of Mac Pharthaláin (see McFarlane ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Bartlett was born in 1532, in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Edmund Barttlett, was 28 and his mother, Agnes Hurst, was -15. He married Johane Miller on 28 October 1558, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1590, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bartlett est né en 1532, à Colyton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Edmund Barttlett, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes Hurst, avait -15 ans. Il a épousé Johane Miller le 28 octobre 1558, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1590, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bartlett 1532 in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Edmund Barttlett 28 und seine Mutter Agnes Hurst -15. Er hat am 28. Oktober 1558 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Johane Miller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1590 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bartlett è nato il nel 1532 nel Colyton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Edmund Barttlett, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Hurst, aveva -15 anni. Lui sposato Johane Miller il 28 ottobre 1558, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1590, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bartlettが1532年にイギリスイギリスデボンコリトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Edmund Barttlettは28歳，母Agnes Hurstは-15歳であった。1558年10月28日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでJohane Millerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1590年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bartlett(이)가 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코리턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Edmund Barttlett(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Hurst(은)는 -15세였다. 그는 1558년 10월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Johane Miller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1590년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bartlett nasceu em 1532, em Colyton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Edmund Barttlett, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Hurst, tinha -15 anos. Ele casou-se com Johane Miller em 28 de outubro de 1558, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1590, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bartlett родился в 1532 г. в местности колитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Edmund Barttlett было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hurst, -15. Он женился на женщине по имени Johane Miller 28 октября 1558 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1590 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bartlett nació en 1532, en Colyton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Edmund Barttlett, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes Hurst, tenía -15 años. Se casó con Johane Miller el 28 de octubre de 1558, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1590, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
